title: Cronos Group Inc. (CRON) Analyst Ratings, Estimates & Forecasts - Yahoo Finance
text: Cronos Group analyst ratings and forecasts on Yahoo Finance. Analysts provide earnings estimates and price targets for CRON stock. Current consensus estimates guide investor decisions. The analyst consensus rating for Cronos Group is Buy, with 3 of 4 analysts rating the stock a Buy. The consensus rating suggests 82% positive analyst sentiment. Analysts' consensus price target of $2.30 suggests estimated downside of -14.21% from current price levels. On the Canadian listing, average price target from 9 analysts is 4.67 CAD, with expected price increase of 30.59%. Various analyst rating platforms provide different target prices and recommendations.
